subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Due to lack of time, I write briefly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت مختصر مرقوم میگردد منظومه جناب
subcodes.subjects: @imagery in the Qur'an, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @praise and encouragement
